name: not_order_ev_pfirst
drl: rule R when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-143 item 1b Family B: when a P is inserted BEFORE the blocker (P-FIRST), the released P's fire by SEGMENT (event-insert count) newest-first, but with ONE initial segment the epoch inserts fire FORWARD (ep1 then ep2), the initial P LAST: [2,3,4,5,1]. Contrast the BLOCKER-first not_order_ev_expiry ([3,2,1], epochs REVERSED) — the blocker-vs-P insert position flips the regime. Engine emitted the reversed (blocker-first) order here pre-D-143.
